debug_info.goal:
Ω : Type u_2
mΩ : MeasurableSpace Ω
X : ℕ → Ω → ENNReal
hX : ∀ (n : ℕ), Measurable (X n)
P : Measure Ω
inst✝ : IsProbabilityMeasure P
⊢ ∃ Y Y_lim,
    (∀ (n : ℕ), Y n ∈ (convexHull ENNReal) (Set.range fun m => X (n + m))) ∧
      Measurable Y_lim ∧ ∀ᵐ (ω : Ω) ∂P, Tendsto (fun x => Y x ω) atTop (nhds (Y_lim ω))

failed_attempts:
have h_bdd : ∀ n ω, 0 ≤ X n ω := fun n ω ↦ ENNReal.zero_le _
  have h_convex : ∀ n, convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range (fun m ↦ X (n + m))) =
      {f | ∃ (s : Finset ℕ) (w : ℕ → ℝ≥0), (∑ i in s, w i) = 1 ∧ f = ∑ i in s, w i • X (n + i)} := by
    intro n; ext f; simp [convexHull, convexHull_family, Set.range]
  choose! Y hY using fun n ↦ Classical.indefiniteDescription _ ⟨X n, by simp⟩
  refine ⟨Y, fun ω ↦ ⨆ n, ⨅ m ≥ n, Y m ω, ?_⟩
  constructor
  · intro n
    exact hY n
  constructor
  · apply Measurable.iSup
    intro n
    apply Measurable.iInf
    intro m _
    exact Measurable.ennreal_smul_const (Measurable.of_uncurry_right (hX _) _) _
  · have : ∀ ω, Monotone fun n ↦ ⨅ m ≥ n, Y m ω := fun ω ↦ iInf_mono (· ⊓ ·)
    refine Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ tendsto_iSup_atTop (this ω)

have h_bdd : ∀ n ω, 0 ≤ X n ω := by
    intro n ω
    exact ENNReal.zero_le _
  have h_convex : ∀ n, Convex ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m)) := by
    intro n
    exact convex_convexHull ℝ≥0∞ _
  have h_measurable : ∀ n, Measurable (fun ω ↦ X n ω) := hX
  have h_integrable : ∀ n, ∫⁻ ω, X n ω ∂P ≤ ⊤ := by
    intro n
    exact ENNReal.le_top
  have h_komlos : ∃ (Y : ℕ → Ω → ℝ≥0∞) (Y_lim : Ω → ℝ≥0∞),
      (∀ n, Y n ∈ convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m))) ∧
      Measurable Y_lim ∧ ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, Tendsto (Y · ω) atTop (𝓝 (Y_lim ω)) := by
    apply Exists.imp (fun ⟨Y, Y_lim, hY, h_meas, h_tendsto⟩ ↦ ⟨Y, Y_lim, hY, h_meas, h_tendsto⟩)
    have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, ∃ (Y_ω : ℕ → ℝ≥0∞) (Y_lim_ω : ℝ≥0∞),
        (∀ n, Y_ω n ∈ convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m) ω)) ∧
        Tendsto Y_ω atTop (𝓝 Y_lim_ω) := by
      intro ω
      have h_bdd_ω : ∃ M : ℝ≥0∞, ∀ n, X n ω ≤ M := by
        use ⊤
        intro n
        exact le_top
      obtain ⟨Y_ω, Y_lim_ω, hY_ω, h_tendsto_ω⟩ := komlos_convex
        (f := fun n ↦ X n ω)
        (φ := id)
        (hφ_nonneg := fun x ↦ ENNReal.zero_le x)
        (hφ_bdd := ⟨⊤, fun n ↦ le_top⟩)
      exact ⟨Y_ω, Y_lim_ω, hY_ω, h_tendsto_ω⟩
    choose! Y Y_lim hY h_tendsto for h_pointwise
    have h_measurable_Y : ∀ n, Measurable (Y n) := by
      intro n
      apply Measurable.ennreal_of_Ici
      intro a
      sorry
    have h_measurable_Y_lim : Measurable Y_lim := by
      apply Measurable.ennreal_of_Ici
      intro a
      sorry
    exact ⟨Y, Y_lim, fun n ↦ hY n, h_measurable_Y_lim, fun ω ↦ h_tendsto ω⟩
  exact h_komlos

have h_bdd : ∀ n ω, 0 ≤ X n ω := fun n ω ↦ ENNReal.zero_le _
  have h_integrable : ∀ n, ∫⁻ ω, X n ω ∂P ≤ ⊤ := fun n ↦ by
    exact ENNReal.ae_measurable.le_top (hX n).ae_measurable
  choose! M hM using fun n ↦ exists_ge (∫⁻ ω, X n ω ∂P)
  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ≥0∞ := fun Z ↦ ∫⁻ ω, Z ω ∂P
  have hφ_nonneg : ∀ Z, 0 ≤ φ Z := fun Z ↦ ENNReal.zero_le _
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M : ℝ≥0∞, ∀ n, φ (X n) ≤ M := ⟨⨆ n, φ (X n), fun n ↦ le_csSup (Set.nonempty_range _) (Set.mem_range_self n)⟩
  obtain ⟨Y, hY_convex, hY_cauchy⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  refine ⟨Y, fun ω ↦ limUnder atTop (Y · ω), ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact hY_convex
  · exact Measurable.limUnder (fun n ↦ (hX (n + 0)).compMeasurable measurable_fst) atTop
  · refine Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ ?_
    have h_cauchy : CauchySeq (Y · ω) := by
      intro ε εpos
      obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hY_cauchy ε εpos
      exact Metric.cauchySeq_of_dist_le_of_tendsto (fun n m hn hm ↦ by
        calc
          dist (Y n ω) (Y m ω) = |(Y n ω - Y m ω)| := by simp [dist_eq_norm]
          _ ≤ 2 * max (Y n ω) (Y m ω) := by
            cases' le_total (Y n ω) (Y m ω) with h h <;> simp_all [abs_of_nonneg, ENNReal.sub_eq_zero_of_le]
          _ < ε := by
            have h1 : φ (Y n) ≤ φ (X (n + 0)) := by
              apply ENNReal.lintegral_mono
              exact Set.image_subset_iff.1 (hY_convex n) (Set.mem_range_self 0)
            have h2 : φ (Y m) ≤ φ (X (m + 0)) := by
              apply ENNReal.lintegral_mono
              exact Set.image_subset_iff.1 (hY_convex m) (Set.mem_range_self 0)
            linarith [hM n, hM m]) atTop
    exact cauchySeq_tendsto_of_complete h_cauchy

by
    have h_bdd : ∀ n ω, 0 ≤ X n ω := fun n ω ↦ ENNReal.zero_le _
    have h_convex : ∀ n, Convex ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m)) := by
      intro n; exact convex_convexHull _ _
    have h_measurable : ∀ n, Measurable (fun ω ↦ X n ω) := hX
    have h_pointwise : ∀ ω, ∃ M : ℝ≥0∞, ∀ n, X n ω ≤ M := by
      intro ω
      use ⨆ n, X n ω
      intro n
      exact le_csSup (Set.nonempty_range_iff.mpr ⟨0, rfl⟩) (Set.mem_range_self n)
    choose! M hM using h_pointwise
    have hM_meas : Measurable M := by
      apply measurable_iSup
      intro n
      exact hX n
    have h_komlos : ∀ ω, ∃ (g : ℕ → ℝ≥0∞) (x : ℝ≥0∞),
        (∀ n, g n ∈ convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m) ω)) ∧
        Tendsto g atTop (𝓝 x) := by
      intro ω
      apply komlos_norm
      · exact ⟨M ω, fun n ↦ hM ω n⟩
    choose! g x hx using h_komlos
    refine ⟨fun n ω ↦ g ω n, fun ω ↦ x ω, ?_⟩
    constructor
    · intro n
      simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_setOf_eq]
      intro ω
      exact (hx ω).1 n
    constructor
    · apply Measurable.of_tendsto
      · intro n
        apply Measurable.of_not_exists
        intro a
        have : Set.univ \ {ω | g ω n ≤ a} = {ω | a < g ω n} := by ext ω; simp
        rw [this]
        apply MeasurableSet_lt
        · exact hM_meas
        · apply measurable_const
      · apply Filter.Eventually.of_forall
        intro ω
        exact (hx ω).2
    · filter_upwards [Filter.eventually_of_forall fun ω ↦ (hx ω).2]
      intro ω h
      exact h

by
    have h_bdd : ∀ n ω, 0 ≤ X n ω := fun n ω ↦ ENNReal.zero_le _
    haveI : MeasurableSpace Ω := mΩ
    have : ∀ n, ∃ M : ℝ, ∀ ω, (X n ω).toReal ≤ M := by
      intro n
      use 1
      intro ω
      exact_mod_cast ENNReal.toReal_le_one (X n ω)
    choose! M hM using this
    have hM' : ∃ M : ℝ, ∀ n ω, (X n ω).toReal ≤ M := by
      use ⨆ n, M n
      intro n ω
      exact le_csSup (Set.nonempty_range_iff.2 ⟨0, rfl⟩) (hM n ω)
    obtain ⟨M, hM⟩ := hM'
    let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ := fun f ↦ ∫⁻ ω, f ω ∂P
    have hφ_nonneg : 0 ≤ φ := by
      intro f
      exact ENNReal.toReal_nonneg _
    have hφ_bdd : ∃ M' : ℝ, ∀ n, φ (X n) ≤ M' := by
      use M
      intro n
      calc
        φ (X n) = ∫⁻ ω, X n ω ∂P := rfl
        _ ≤ ∫⁻ ω, M ∂P := ENNReal.lintegral_mono fun ω ↦ ENNReal.ofReal_le_of_le_toReal (hM n ω)
        _ = M := by simp [IsProbabilityMeasure.lintegral_const]
    obtain ⟨Y, hY⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
    use Y
    use fun ω ↦ ⨆ n, ⨅ m ≥ n, Y m ω
    constructor
    · exact hY.1
    · constructor
      · exact Measurable.iSup fun n ↦ Measurable.iInf fun m _ ↦ hX (n + m)
      · apply Filter.EventuallyEq.mp
        apply Filter.Eventually.mono (Filter.eventually_forall_atTop.mpr fun n ↦ ?_)
        intro ω
        have h_conv : Convex ℝ≥0∞ (Set.Ici 0) := by
          exact convex_Ici
        have h_seq : ∀ n, Y n ω ∈ Set.Ici 0 := by
          intro n
          exact ENNReal.zero_le _
        have h_tendsto : Tendsto (fun n ↦ Y n ω) atTop (𝓝 (⨆ n, ⨅ m ≥ n, Y m ω)) := by
          exact tendsto_iSup_nat
        exact h_tendsto

by
  have h_bdd : ∀ n ω, 0 ≤ X n ω := fun n ω ↦ ENNReal.zero_le _
  have h_int : ∀ n, ∫⁻ ω, X n ω ∂P ≤ ⊤ := fun n ↦ by simp [ENNReal.ae_measurable_iff]
  have h_fin : ∀ n, ∫⁻ ω, X n ω ∂P < ⊤ := by
    intro n
    have : ∫⁻ ω, X n ω ∂P = ∫⁻ ω, X n ω ∂P := rfl
    exact ENNReal.not_top_of_ne_top (by simpa using h_int n)
  choose C hC using fun n ↦ ENNReal.exists_real_btwn (h_fin n)
  let X' : ℕ → Ω → ℝ := fun n ω ↦ (X n ω).toReal
  have hX'_meas : ∀ n, Measurable (X' n) := by
    intro n
    refine Measurable.ennreal_toReal (hX n) ?_
    exact fun ω ↦ by simpa using h_bdd n ω
  have hX'_bdd : ∃ M : ℝ, ∀ n ω, |X' n ω| ≤ M := by
    use 1 + ⨆ n, C n
    intro n ω
    have : X n ω ≤ C n := by simpa using hC n
    have : X' n ω = (X n ω).toReal := rfl
    rw [this]
    exact abs_toReal_le_of_le (by simpa using h_bdd n ω) this (by linarith [le_csupr (by simp) n])
  obtain ⟨Y', x, hY', hx⟩ := komlos_norm (fun n ↦ fun ω ↦ X' n ω) hX'_bdd
  let Y : ℕ → Ω → ℝ≥0∞ := fun n ω ↦ ENNReal.ofReal (Y' n ω)
  let Y_lim : Ω → ℝ≥0∞ := fun ω ↦ ENNReal.ofReal (x ω)
  refine ⟨Y, Y_lim, ?_, ?_, ?_⟩
  · intro n
    have : Y' n ∈ convexHull ℝ (Set.range fun m ↦ X' (n + m)) := hY' n
    have : Y n = fun ω ↦ ENNReal.ofReal (Y' n ω) := rfl
    rw [this]
    refine Set.image_subset_iff.2 fun ω ↦ ?_
    have : Y' n ω ∈ convexHull ℝ (Set.range fun m ↦ X' (n + m)) := by
      simpa using this
    have : ENNReal.ofReal '' (convexHull ℝ (Set.range fun m ↦ X' (n + m))) ⊆
        convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m)) := by
      apply convexHull_mono
      rintro y ⟨m, rfl⟩
      simp [X']
    exact this this
  · refine Measurable.ennreal_ofReal (hx.measurable ?_)
    · intro n
      refine Measurable.ennreal_ofReal (hX'_meas n) ?_
      intro ω
      simpa using h_bdd n ω
    · intro ω
      have : 0 ≤ x ω := by
        have : ∀ n, 0 ≤ Y' n ω := by
          intro n
          have : 0 ≤ X' n ω := by simpa using h_bdd n ω
          exact le_of_tendsto hx (Filter.eventually_atTop.2 ⟨n, fun m _ ↦ by simpa using this⟩)
        exact le_of_tendsto hx (Filter.eventually_atTop.2 ⟨0, fun m _ ↦ by simpa using this m⟩)
      simpa using this
  · filter_upwards [ae_of_all fun ω ↦ h_bdd 0 ω] with ω hω
    have : Tendsto (fun n ↦ Y' n ω) atTop (𝓝 (x ω)) := hx ω
    refine Tendsto.congr' (this.mono_left Filter.atTop_le_atTop) ?_
    intro n
    simp [Y, Y_lim]
    congr

have h_bdd : ∀ n ω, X n ω ≥ 0 := fun n ω ↦ by positivity
  let φ : (Ω → ℝ≥0∞) → ℝ≥0∞ := fun f ↦ ∫⁻ ω, f ω ∂P
  have hφ_nonneg : ∀ f, 0 ≤ φ f := by intro f; exact ENNReal.zero_le _
  have hφ_bdd : ∃ M : ℝ≥0∞, ∀ n, φ (X n) ≤ M := by
    refine ⟨∫⁻ ω, ⨆ n, X n ω ∂P, fun n ↦ ?_⟩
    exact le_integral_supr (fun n ↦ hX n) n
  obtain ⟨Y, hY_convex, hY_cauchy⟩ := komlos_convex hφ_nonneg hφ_bdd
  use Y
  have h_meas : ∀ n, Measurable (Y n) := by
    intro n
    have : Y n ∈ convexHull ℝ≥0∞ (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m)) := hY_convex n
    exact Measurable.convexHull_of_measurableSet (Set.range fun m ↦ X (n + m))
      (fun m ↦ hX (n + m)) this
  have h_tendsto : ∀ᵐ ω ∂P, ∃ l, Tendsto (fun n ↦ Y n ω) atTop (𝓝 l) := by
    apply Filter.eventually_of_forall
    intro ω
    have : CauchySeq fun n ↦ Y n ω := by
      intro ε εpos
      obtain ⟨N, hN⟩ := hY_cauchy ε εpos
      use N
      intro n m hn hm
      simp only [Metric.dist_eq_norm, norm_eq_abs, abs_sub_comm]
      have : 2⁻¹ * φ (Y n) + 2⁻¹ * φ (Y m) - φ ((2 : ℝ≥0∞)⁻¹ • (Y n + Y m)) < ε := hN n m hn hm
      simp_all [integral_add, integral_smul, mul_assoc]
    exact cauchySeq_tendsto.1 this
  choose! Y_lim hY_lim_tendsto using h_tendsto
  use Y_lim
  constructor
  · exact hY_convex
  constructor
  · exact Measurable.of_tendsto_atTop (fun n ↦ h_meas n) hY_lim_tendsto
  · exact hY_lim_tendsto

  · exact ⟨0, fun n ↦ by simpa using h_bdd.choose_spec n⟩

by
  have h_bdd : ∃ M : ℝ, ∀ n ω, (X n ω).toReal ≤ M := by
    use 1
    intro n ω
    exact ENNReal.toReal_le_one (X n ω)
  have h_measurable : ∀ n, Measurable (fun ω ↦ (X n ω).toReal) := by
    intro n
    exact Measurable.comp ENNReal.measurable_toReal (hX n)
  obtain ⟨Y_real, Y_lim_real, hY_real, hY_lim_real_meas, hY_tendsto⟩ :=
    @komlos_norm ℝ _ _ _ (fun n ω ↦ (X n ω).toReal) (by
      exact ⟨1, fun n ω ↦ ENNReal.toReal_le_one (X n ω)⟩)
  use fun n ω ↦ ENNReal.ofReal (Y_real n ω)
  use fun ω ↦ ENNReal.ofReal (Y_lim_real ω)
  constructor
  · intro n
    simp only [Set.mem_range, Set.mem_convexHull]
    have h_incl : Set.range (fun m ↦ X (n + m)) ⊇
        ENNReal.ofReal '' Set.range (fun m ω ↦ (X (n + m) ω).toReal) := by
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨m, rfl⟩
      use m
      simp
    exact convexHull_mono h_incl (hY_real n)
  · constructor
    · exact Measurable.comp ENNReal.measurable_ofReal hY_lim_real_meas
    · filter_upwards
      intro ω
      have h_tendsto : Tendsto (fun n ↦ ENNReal.ofReal (Y_real n ω)) atTop
          (𝓝 (ENNReal.ofReal (Y_lim_real ω))) := by
        exact tendsto_ofReal.comp hY_tendsto
      simpa using h_tendsto
